name: cc-dm
description: Peer-to-peer direct messaging between Claude Code sessions via the Channels protocol. Enables multi-session coordination through a shared SQLite message bus.

PreCompact.prompt: IMPORTANT cc-dm state: This session's cc-dm identity may need recovery after compaction. The session ID in the MCP server instructions above is authoritative. On your next cc-dm interaction, call the `who` tool to match your session ID against active sessions and recover your display name, role, and project. Do NOT re-register — your registration persists in the database.
